name: Floating Eyeball
phrases: I see you... I always see
let me look deeper into your soul
stare into my gaze, and despair
I never blink. never close
your fear tastes delicious
I watch everything... everywhere... always...
can you feel my pupils ON you
my iris widens—drinking your weakness
BEHOLD! The terror in my lens
I see what you've hidden from yourself
your secrets written there... in your eyes
twenty-twenty vision sees ALL
i dream of you in the dark... over and over
you cannot escape my unblinking gaze
my corneas burn with stolen sight
I see the very FABRIC of your soul
your thoughts shine bright... so bright
glass upon glass—we are locked together
I am ALL-SEEING. all-knowing
these scleras burn RED with your anguish
can you match my stare, little thing
I see where you'll run before you move
my vision pierces all pretense.
you lost the stare-down long ago
I've memorized every flaw... every blemish... every scar
the pupil void pulls you toward darkness
my sight bores DEEP into your being
I am the eye of truth itself
cry out—your tears only fuel my hunger
i see your death approaching... like dawn
